title: Better Piglin Bartering
description: Buffs Piglin bartering to give more Ender Pearls and balanced loot —  Best for speedrun practice.
body:
This mod tweaks Piglin bartering loot to increase the chance and amount of Ender Pearls while keeping other vanilla barter items balanced.

Made for fun gameplay, practice speedruns, or casual survival worlds.

⚠️ Not intended for use in official or competitive speedruns.

Features:

Higher Ender Pearl drops

Full vanilla Piglin barter pool retained

Balanced weights so bartering still feels random

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer (server-side install required)

Minecraft Version: 1.21.8
Loader: Fabric
